# Atlas Card Germany — synthetic terms fixture

This document is fictional and license-safe. It exists only to verify CardStats data modeling.

- Eligible users: residents of Germany aged 18 or older.
- Card: prepaid Visa; EUR base currency; crypto converts to EUR before authorization.
- Core plan: EUR 0 monthly fee, 0.5% reward, EUR 10 monthly reward cap.
- Plus plan: EUR 9.99 monthly fee, 2% reward, EUR 50 monthly reward cap.
- Foreign exchange fee: 1% on both plans.
- ATM fee: 2% after the first EUR 200 withdrawn each month.
- Monthly spend limit: EUR 20,000.

Effective 1 July 2026. Observed 12 July 2026.
